records.question: Which papers have authors listed with an authorship order of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder <= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.paperID
FROM Papers p
JOIN Authorship a ON p.paperID = a.paperID
WHERE a.authOrder <= 1

records.question: Which papers have an author from the University of Oxford in the UK who is listed as author number 2 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN inst ON authorship.instid = inst.instid
WHERE inst.country = 'UK' AND inst.name = 'University of Oxford' AND authorship.authorder >= 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.paperID
FROM Papers p
JOIN Authorship a ON p.paperID = a.paperID
JOIN Inst i ON a.instID = i.instID
WHERE i.name = 'University of Oxford' AND i.country = 'UK' AND a.authOrder >= 2

records.question: Which papers include Amal Ahmed as an author with an authorship order of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Amal' AND authors.lname = 'Ahmed' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.paperID
FROM Authors a
JOIN Authorship au ON a.authID = au.authID
JOIN Papers p ON au.paperID = p.paperID
WHERE a.lname = 'Ahmed' AND a.fname = 'Amal' AND au.authOrder >= 1
